TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: papangaay ŚįŹťáĎśĘÖŤĎČ papangaay mitesakay nipangangan Hypoxis aurea Lour. Sapamata ngangan Sapamata nganganšĽôŤĆÖÁßĎ(Hypoxidaceae) tungusay ngangan(ŚĪ¨Śźćpapangaan lutukŚįŹťáĎśĘÖŤćČŚĪ¨ u ngangan kalawlaway san baluťĽÉŤäĪŚŹÉ kamu nu binacadan ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Makuis Lisav Tu Ismud,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Papangaay,ťĄí Taravungun Tanau Bunun Makuis Lisav Tu Ismud, Sakizaya Papangaay, Co Taravungun Tanau. mukanan nu binacadan ŚłÉŤĺ≤,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ,ťĄí Bunun, Sakizaya, Co. hekal a kaliwaliwah papangaan u langaw mahamin i kasa niyazu' kasa kakitizaan. manamu mulangaw isasa tu 2800 a depah su-li-lin, cen-kuw-papah milamel i kilakilangan tu pananumanay, i lutulutukan anucaay makelahay a lala'. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sakakapah nu sapaiyui sapingaay tu, alababay a buwaa', sakakapah nu tatama, micunus tu angil. (kamu nu Hulam:ŚäüÁĒ®:śļęŤÖé,Ś£ĮťôĹ,Ť£úśį£) wayway nu mauzipay papangaan u sapamata ueli' tungusa papangaan, tungusa pinaay tu a mihcaan nu mulangaway a lutuk, u talakaw pakalal tu 3-23 hunan, anganganan mahiza u lamit u siheciay masati'kuk anucaay masamulmul ku tektek, u tayayu' 4-6 a hunan u tabaki 1 a hunan. u papah masakulawlawan ku kulit i tulis nu papah sibanuh, u tanayu' pakala tu 8-28 kung-li, u ahebal 0.5-1 hunan. 5-7 a bulad mabutelak tu kalawlaway a kulit, balu nu lamit u talakaw pakala tu 3-9 a hunan, balu nu satabu adidi' tusa aca, enem ku balu nu papahan, tama a kasabalu enem. u heci i 7-9 a muladan mazuhem tu, masaculayay a heci u tanayu' pakala tu 0.5-1 a hunan,duhepic ku pudac nu heci, u hekal sapucu'pucu' sa adidi' mahapinang mahiza u gang masapucu'. (kamu nu Hulam: ,ŤŅĎťĚ©Ť≥™,ŤĘęťē∑śĮõ. pnaay tu a mihcaan nu mulangaway a lutuk, sadingsingan balangbangan tusa a puu' an ka butelakan nu bala, siledekay nu mulangaway. angangan lamit masaatilad, u telek cacay hunan masamali anucaay masatanayu' ku kamulmul , matahpuay nu maikesay nu akaway a papah laclac nu kudih. makay angangan mulangaw ku papah 4-12 a papahan, u papah tanayu'sa masakeliw, angangan nu papah masatanayu' mazicem masinang ku papah, mahiza u katul, tanayu' ku banuh. papangaan ancaay ka butelak ku balu hawsa, uyza dada' ku maazihay tanayu' adidi' ku papah, u adidi'ay a lutuk han nu itiniay ciniza, kulawlaw adidi' ku balu niza, caay kahatiza u kalibuwa' katabak, i apuyu'ay a lutukan mahizaay u bunac mabutelak tu. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kakanen atu lalangawan papangaan a lutuk mahiniay adidi'ay kulawlaway kulit a balu kanahatu i Nan-huy maazihay tu i zazanan, u angangan lamit niza yadah ku sakakapah tu uzip atu sibihun, u sakapahay a kakanan, nika u angangan lamit nu heni calakah ku kudih, caay kadayum mikemkem, salamen kya mamuni. cunus tuyni sumamaday a ukak i abu matepa, kya palatateng iayaw nu 17 mang a mihcaan, i kasumamada tu ba'tuay henay a ziday nu tademaw hakay matineng tuway misalamal. uyni u bihun nu papangaan tungusa namakay kasumamadan henay a ziday, u tademaw malingatu tu u kilang kunisanga'an tu aikecay saspikutkut tu mulangaway u angangana lamit. Ci Wa-ti-li a pasubana'ay a tademaw tu cabay atu mikingkiway maapulung tu mikingkiway a tademaw, ci Ti-ay-li-ke a pasubanaay "Francesco d'Errico" sakamu sa, mingikiway a sakaput i lilis nu buhang matepa ku cacay kasuy a ukak, pisangaan a demiaan taneng mikilim ayaw nu 4 mang a mihcaan, sazikuzay, uyni papangaan a lutuk u ukak namatepa pilangawan nai' ku langaw tu zumaay a lalangawan, tinisaca i buhang labu nu siabuay, tateng' namiala misuped tuynian mulangaway hawsa, tangsul caykasaan kanen nu heni, patayzaen nu heni I buhang amipalada', itawya makakanum tu, ma atineng palada', satu sakay kakanan matineng tu misazuma tu kakanan. ayzaay a tademaw kanahatu caay tu pukan tu papangaan a lutuk, nika mahicahica u Bei-cuw au In-tu, papangaan a lutuk mala u kahenulan tu a lutuk u sapayu a lutuk, u sakakapah nu bituka, kacekukan tu mala u kalalutinan tu nu mita tu kasumamadanay a tademaw. mitesekay nu migikiway i Na-huy nu migikiway maazihay tu nu mita ku kaliyuhan tu nikauzip nu kasumamadanay a tademaw, a muliyaw aca misaicelang tu tuas nu tademaw namakay Bei-cuw matepa ku nazipaan sanay a kamu, tahkal i lali' malahad ku kaliyuhan atu cayay ka zatengay a kawaw. (kamu nu Hulam: .) papangaan singangan aca tu masaeli'ay, kalawlaway ku kulit nu balu enem ku balu, kanamuhan ku wayway nia, itawya namatengil ku kamu namaazih tu i nalinabuwan tu"walibayuan" sa. (kamu nu Hulam: "Ť¶čťĀé.) i I-lan Tuw-cen piazihan tu salungayay a kakitizaan, mamin mipasasa tu kazizeng hawsa mikilim tu banihiway a kakitizaan mihibang mueneng, keni' tu mata maazih ku cacay kalawlaway balu i tapiingan tu, u bau kamacalan a balu asaan. u "papangaan a lutuk", itawyay mahicaay caay katineng caay kalucek ku demiad hakya, u balu niza caay kahamin a mabutelak, sakalamkam satu mulekal mikilim tu tepalay a kakitizaan izaw henay hakya ku balu asaan, mahini sa matepa tu ku pilangawan niza matepa tu ku mabutelakay a balu, macaliway tu pinaay tu a mihcaan katanayu' ku pitapal tu langaw niza, maazih tu ciniza cacay a mihcaan kinatusa mabutelak ku balu, sadingsingan balangbangan mabutelak tu ku balu ziza. (kamu nu Hulam: .)
S.PHON: papaŇčaaj **** papaŇčaaj mit…ôsakaj nipaŇčaŇčan ńßjpo*is aur…ôa r~…ĺour. sapamata ŇčaŇčan sapamata ŇčaŇčan***(ńßjpo*ida ¶…ôa…ô) tuŇčusaj ŇčaŇčan(**papaŇčaan r~…ĺutuk***** u ŇčaŇčan kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj san bar~…ĺu*** kamu nu bina ¶adan ** makuis r~…ĺisa* tu ismud,**** papaŇčaaj,* tara*uŇčun tanau bunun makuis r~…ĺisa* tu ismud, sakizaja papaŇčaaj, ¶o tara*uŇčun tanau. mukanan nu bina ¶adan **,****,* bunun, sakizaja, ¶o. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß papaŇčaan u r~…ĺaŇčaw mańßamin i kasa nijazu Ē~ ° kasa kakitizaan. manamu mur~…ĺaŇčaw isasa tu **** a d…ôpańß su-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺin, ¶…ôn-kuw-papańß mir~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan tu pananumanaj, i r~…ĺutur~…ĺutukan anu ¶aaj mak…ôr~…ĺańßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sakakapańß nu sapaijui sapiŇčaaj tu, ar~…ĺababaj a buwaa Ē~ °, sakakapańß nu tatama, mi ¶unus tu aŇčir~…ĺ. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:**:**,**,**) wajwaj nu mauzipaj papaŇčaan u sapamata u…ôr~…ĺi Ē~ ° tuŇčusa papaŇčaan, tuŇčusa pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutuk, u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺar~…ĺ tu *-** ńßunan, aŇčaŇčanan mańßiza u r~…ĺamit u sińß…ô ¶iaj masati Ē~ °kuk anu ¶aaj masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ ku t…ôkt…ôk, u tajaju Ē~ ° *-* a ńßunan u tabaki * a ńßunan. u papańß masakur~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ku kur~…ĺit i tur~…ĺis nu papańß sibanuńß, u tanaju Ē~ ° pakar~…ĺa tu *-** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ *.*-* ńßunan. *-* a bur~…ĺad mabut…ôr~…ĺak tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺit, bar~…ĺu nu r~…ĺamit u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺa tu *-* a ńßunan, bar~…ĺu nu satabu adidi Ē~ ° tusa a ¶a, …ôn…ôm ku bar~…ĺu nu papańßan, tama a kasabar~…ĺu …ôn…ôm. u ńß…ô ¶i i *-* a mur~…ĺadan mazuńß…ôm tu, masa ¶ur~…ĺajaj a ńß…ô ¶i u tanaju Ē~ ° pakar~…ĺa tu *.*-* a ńßunan,duńß…ôpi ¶ ku puda ¶ nu ńß…ô ¶i, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sapu ¶u Ē~ °pu ¶u Ē~ ° sa adidi Ē~ ° mańßapinaŇč mańßiza u gaŇč masapu ¶u Ē~ °. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ,***,***. pnaaj tu a mińß ¶aan nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutuk, sadiŇčsiŇčan bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan tusa a puu Ē~ ° an ka but…ôr~…ĺakan nu bar~…ĺa, sir~…ĺ…ôd…ôkaj nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj. aŇčaŇčan r~…ĺamit masaatir~…ĺad, u t…ôr~…ĺ…ôk ¶a ¶aj ńßunan masamar~…ĺi anu ¶aaj masatanaju Ē~ ° ku kamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ , matańßpuaj nu maik…ôsaj nu akawaj a papańß r~…ĺa ¶r~…ĺa ¶ nu kudińß. makaj aŇčaŇčan mur~…ĺaŇčaw ku papańß *-** a papańßan, u papańß tanaju Ē~ °sa masak…ôr~…ĺiw, aŇčaŇčan nu papańß masatanaju Ē~ ° mazi ¶…ôm masinaŇč ku papańß, mańßiza u katur~…ĺ, tanaju Ē~ ° ku banuńß. papaŇčaan an ¶aaj ka but…ôr~…ĺak ku bar~…ĺu ńßawsa, ujza dada Ē~ ° ku maazińßaj tanaju Ē~ ° adidi Ē~ ° ku papańß, u adidi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺutuk ńßan nu itiniaj ¶iniza, kur~…ĺawr~…ĺaw adidi Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺu niza, ¶aaj kańßatiza u kar~…ĺibuwa Ē~ ° katabak, i apuju Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺutukan mańßizaaj u buna ¶ mabut…ôr~…ĺak tu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kakan…ôn atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan papaŇčaan a r~…ĺutuk mańßiniaj adidi Ē~ °aj kur~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj kur~…ĺit a bar~…ĺu kanańßatu i nan-ńßuj maazińßaj tu i zazanan, u aŇčaŇčan r~…ĺamit niza jadańß ku sakakapańß tu uzip atu sibińßun, u sakapańßaj a kakanan, nika u aŇčaŇčan r~…ĺamit nu ńß…ôni ¶ar~…ĺakańß ku kudińß, ¶aaj kadajum mik…ômk…ôm, sar~…ĺam…ôn kja mamuni. ¶unus tujni sumamadaj a ukak i abu mat…ôpa, kja par~…ĺatat…ôŇč iajaw nu ** maŇč a mińß ¶aan, i kasumamada tu ba Ē~ °tuaj ńß…ônaj a zidaj nu tad…ômaw ńßakaj matin…ôŇč tuwaj misar~…ĺamar~…ĺ. ujni u bińßun nu papaŇčaan tuŇčusa namakaj kasumamadan ńß…ônaj a zidaj, u tad…ômaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu u kir~…ĺaŇč kunisaŇča Ē~ °an tu aik…ô ¶aj saspikutkut tu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj u aŇčaŇčana r~…ĺamit. ¶i wa-ti-r~…ĺi a pasubana Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw tu ¶abaj atu mikiŇčkiwaj maapur~…ĺuŇč tu mikiŇčkiwaj a tad…ômaw, ¶i ti-aj-r~…ĺi-k…ô a pasubanaaj "fran ¶…ôs ¶o d Ē~ °…ôrri ¶o" sakamu sa, miŇčikiwaj a sakaput i r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu buńßaŇč mat…ôpa ku ¶a ¶aj kasuj a ukak, pisaŇčaan a d…ômiaan tan…ôŇč mikir~…ĺim ajaw nu * maŇč a mińß ¶aan, sazikuzaj, ujni papaŇčaan a r~…ĺutuk u ukak namat…ôpa pir~…ĺaŇčawan nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺaŇčaw tu zumaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, tinisa ¶a i buńßaŇč r~…ĺabu nu siabuaj, tat…ôŇč Ē~ ° namiar~…ĺa misup…ôd tujnian mur~…ĺaŇčawaj ńßawsa, taŇčsur~…ĺ ¶ajkasaan kan…ôn nu ńß…ôni, patajza…ôn nu ńß…ôni i buńßaŇč amipar~…ĺada Ē~ °, itawja makakanum tu, ma atin…ôŇč par~…ĺada Ē~ °, satu sakaj kakanan matin…ôŇč tu misazuma tu kakanan. ajzaaj a tad…ômaw kanańßatu ¶aaj tu pukan tu papaŇčaan a r~…ĺutuk, nika mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a u b…ôi- ¶uw au in-tu, papaŇčaan a r~…ĺutuk mar~…ĺa u kańß…ônur~…ĺan tu a r~…ĺutuk u sapaju a r~…ĺutuk, u sakakapańß nu bituka, ka ¶…ôkukan tu mar~…ĺa u kar~…ĺar~…ĺutinan tu nu mita tu kasumamadanaj a tad…ômaw. mit…ôs…ôkaj nu migikiwaj i na-ńßuj nu migikiwaj maazińßaj tu nu mita ku kar~…ĺijuńßan tu nikauzip nu kasumamadanaj a tad…ômaw, a mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu tuas nu tad…ômaw namakaj b…ôi- ¶uw mat…ôpa ku nazipaan sanaj a kamu, tańßkar~…ĺ i r~…ĺar~…ĺi Ē~ ° mar~…ĺańßad ku kar~…ĺijuńßan atu ¶ajaj ka zat…ôŇčaj a kawaw. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) papaŇčaan siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu masa…ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °aj, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj ku kur~…ĺit nu bar~…ĺu …ôn…ôm ku bar~…ĺu, kanamuńßan ku wajwaj nia, itawja namat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ku kamu namaazińß tu i nar~…ĺinabuwan tu"war~…ĺibajuan" sa. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: "**.) i i-r~…ĺan tuw- ¶…ôn piazińßan tu sar~…ĺuŇčajaj a kakitizaan, mamin mipasasa tu kaziz…ôŇč ńßawsa mikir~…ĺim tu banińßiwaj a kakitizaan mińßibaŇč mu…ôn…ôŇč, k…ôni Ē~ ° tu mata maazińß ku ¶a ¶aj kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj bar~…ĺu i tapiiŇčan tu, u bau kama ¶ar~…ĺan a bar~…ĺu asaan. u "papaŇčaan a r~…ĺutuk", itawjaj mańßi ¶aaj ¶aaj katin…ôŇč ¶aaj kar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku d…ômiad ńßakja, u bar~…ĺu niza ¶aaj kańßamin a mabut…ôr~…ĺak, sakar~…ĺamkam satu mur~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ mikir~…ĺim tu t…ôpar~…ĺaj a kakitizaan izaw ńß…ônaj ńßakja ku bar~…ĺu asaan, mańßini sa mat…ôpa tu ku pir~…ĺaŇčawan niza mat…ôpa tu ku mabut…ôr~…ĺakaj a bar~…ĺu, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan katanaju Ē~ ° ku pitapar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺaŇčaw niza, maazińß tu ¶iniza ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan kinatusa mabut…ôr~…ĺak ku bar~…ĺu, sadiŇčsiŇčan bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan mabut…ôr~…ĺak tu ku bar~…ĺu ziza. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .)
S.FORM: papangaay ŚįŹťáĎśĘÖŤĎČ papangaay mitesakay nipangangan Hypoxis aurea Lour. Sapamata ngangan Sapamata nganganšĽôŤĆÖÁßĎ(Hypoxidaceae) tungusay ngangan(ŚĪ¨Śźćpapangaan lutukŚįŹťáĎśĘÖŤćČŚĪ¨ u ngangan kalawlaway san baluťĽÉŤäĪŚŹÉ kamu nu binacadan ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Makuis Lisav Tu Ismud,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Papangaay,ťĄí Taravungun Tanau Bunun Makuis Lisav Tu Ismud, Sakizaya Papangaay, Co Taravungun Tanau. mukanan nu binacadan ŚłÉŤĺ≤,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ,ťĄí Bunun, Sakizaya, Co. hekal a kaliwaliwah papangaan u langaw mahamin i kasa niyazu' kasa kakitizaan. manamu mulangaw isasa tu 2800 a depah su-li-lin, cen-kuw-papah milamel i kilakilangan tu pananumanay, i lutulutukan anucaay makelahay a lala'. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sakakapah nu sapaiyui sapingaay tu, alababay a buwaa', sakakapah nu tatama, micunus tu angil. (kamu nu Hulam:ŚäüÁĒ®:śļęŤÖé,Ś£ĮťôĹ,Ť£úśį£) wayway nu mauzipay papangaan u sapamata ueli' tungusa papangaan, tungusa pinaay tu a mihcaan nu mulangaway a lutuk, u talakaw pakalal tu 3-23 hunan, anganganan mahiza u lamit u siheciay masati'kuk anucaay masamulmul ku tektek, u tayayu' 4-6 a hunan u tabaki 1 a hunan. u papah masakulawlawan ku kulit i tulis nu papah sibanuh, u tanayu' pakala tu 8-28 kung-li, u ahebal 0.5-1 hunan. 5-7 a bulad mabutelak tu kalawlaway a kulit, balu nu lamit u talakaw pakala tu 3-9 a hunan, balu nu satabu adidi' tusa aca, enem ku balu nu papahan, tama a kasabalu enem. u heci i 7-9 a muladan mazuhem tu, masaculayay a heci u tanayu' pakala tu 0.5-1 a hunan,duhepic ku pudac nu heci, u hekal sapucu'pucu' sa adidi' mahapinang mahiza u gang masapucu'. (kamu nu Hulam: ,ŤŅĎťĚ©Ť≥™,ŤĘęťē∑śĮõ. pnaay tu a mihcaan nu mulangaway a lutuk, sadingsingan balangbangan tusa a puu' an ka butelakan nu bala, siledekay nu mulangaway. angangan lamit masaatilad, u telek cacay hunan masamali anucaay masatanayu' ku kamulmul , matahpuay nu maikesay nu akaway a papah laclac nu kudih. makay angangan mulangaw ku papah 4-12 a papahan, u papah tanayu'sa masakeliw, angangan nu papah masatanayu' mazicem masinang ku papah, mahiza u katul, tanayu' ku banuh. papangaan ancaay ka butelak ku balu hawsa, uyza dada' ku maazihay tanayu' adidi' ku papah, u adidi'ay a lutuk han nu itiniay ciniza, kulawlaw adidi' ku balu niza, caay kahatiza u kalibuwa' katabak, i apuyu'ay a lutukan mahizaay u bunac mabutelak tu. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kakanen atu lalangawan papangaan a lutuk mahiniay adidi'ay kulawlaway kulit a balu kanahatu i Nan-huy maazihay tu i zazanan, u angangan lamit niza yadah ku sakakapah tu uzip atu sibihun, u sakapahay a kakanan, nika u angangan lamit nu heni calakah ku kudih, caay kadayum mikemkem, salamen kya mamuni. cunus tuyni sumamaday a ukak i abu matepa, kya palatateng iayaw nu 17 mang a mihcaan, i kasumamada tu ba'tuay henay a ziday nu tademaw hakay matineng tuway misalamal. uyni u bihun nu papangaan tungusa namakay kasumamadan henay a ziday, u tademaw malingatu tu u kilang kunisanga'an tu aikecay saspikutkut tu mulangaway u angangana lamit. Ci Wa-ti-li a pasubana'ay a tademaw tu cabay atu mikingkiway maapulung tu mikingkiway a tademaw, ci Ti-ay-li-ke a pasubanaay "Francesco d'Errico" sakamu sa, mingikiway a sakaput i lilis nu buhang matepa ku cacay kasuy a ukak, pisangaan a demiaan taneng mikilim ayaw nu 4 mang a mihcaan, sazikuzay, uyni papangaan a lutuk u ukak namatepa pilangawan nai' ku langaw tu zumaay a lalangawan, tinisaca i buhang labu nu siabuay, tateng' namiala misuped tuynian mulangaway hawsa, tangsul caykasaan kanen nu heni, patayzaen nu heni I buhang amipalada', itawya makakanum tu, ma atineng palada', satu sakay kakanan matineng tu misazuma tu kakanan. ayzaay a tademaw kanahatu caay tu pukan tu papangaan a lutuk, nika mahicahica u Bei-cuw au In-tu, papangaan a lutuk mala u kahenulan tu a lutuk u sapayu a lutuk, u sakakapah nu bituka, kacekukan tu mala u kalalutinan tu nu mita tu kasumamadanay a tademaw. mitesekay nu migikiway i Na-huy nu migikiway maazihay tu nu mita ku kaliyuhan tu nikauzip nu kasumamadanay a tademaw, a muliyaw aca misaicelang tu tuas nu tademaw namakay Bei-cuw matepa ku nazipaan sanay a kamu, tahkal i lali' malahad ku kaliyuhan atu cayay ka zatengay a kawaw. (kamu nu Hulam: .) papangaan singangan aca tu masaeli'ay, kalawlaway ku kulit nu balu enem ku balu, kanamuhan ku wayway nia, itawya namatengil ku kamu namaazih tu i nalinabuwan tu"walibayuan" sa. (kamu nu Hulam: "Ť¶čťĀé.) i I-lan Tuw-cen piazihan tu salungayay a kakitizaan, mamin mipasasa tu kazizeng hawsa mikilim tu banihiway a kakitizaan mihibang mueneng, keni' tu mata maazih ku cacay kalawlaway balu i tapiingan tu, u bau kamacalan a balu asaan. u "papangaan a lutuk", itawyay mahicaay caay katineng caay kalucek ku demiad hakya, u balu niza caay kahamin a mabutelak, sakalamkam satu mulekal mikilim tu tepalay a kakitizaan izaw henay hakya ku balu asaan, mahini sa matepa tu ku pilangawan niza matepa tu ku mabutelakay a balu, macaliway tu pinaay tu a mihcaan katanayu' ku pitapal tu langaw niza, maazih tu ciniza cacay a mihcaan kinatusa mabutelak ku balu, sadingsingan balangbangan mabutelak tu ku balu ziza. (kamu nu Hulam: .)
S.PHON: papaŇčaaj **** papaŇčaaj mit…ôsakaj nipaŇčaŇčan ńßjpo*is aur…ôa r~…ĺour. sapamata ŇčaŇčan sapamata ŇčaŇčan***(ńßjpo*ida ¶…ôa…ô) tuŇčusaj ŇčaŇčan(**papaŇčaan r~…ĺutuk***** u ŇčaŇčan kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj san bar~…ĺu*** kamu nu bina ¶adan ** makuis r~…ĺisa* tu ismud,**** papaŇčaaj,* tara*uŇčun tanau bunun makuis r~…ĺisa* tu ismud, sakizaja papaŇčaaj, ¶o tara*uŇčun tanau. mukanan nu bina ¶adan **,****,* bunun, sakizaja, ¶o. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß papaŇčaan u r~…ĺaŇčaw mańßamin i kasa nijazu Ē~ ° kasa kakitizaan. manamu mur~…ĺaŇčaw isasa tu **** a d…ôpańß su-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺin, ¶…ôn-kuw-papańß mir~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan tu pananumanaj, i r~…ĺutur~…ĺutukan anu ¶aaj mak…ôr~…ĺańßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sakakapańß nu sapaijui sapiŇčaaj tu, ar~…ĺababaj a buwaa Ē~ °, sakakapańß nu tatama, mi ¶unus tu aŇčir~…ĺ. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:**:**,**,**) wajwaj nu mauzipaj papaŇčaan u sapamata u…ôr~…ĺi Ē~ ° tuŇčusa papaŇčaan, tuŇčusa pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutuk, u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺar~…ĺ tu *-** ńßunan, aŇčaŇčanan mańßiza u r~…ĺamit u sińß…ô ¶iaj masati Ē~ °kuk anu ¶aaj masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ ku t…ôkt…ôk, u tajaju Ē~ ° *-* a ńßunan u tabaki * a ńßunan. u papańß masakur~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ku kur~…ĺit i tur~…ĺis nu papańß sibanuńß, u tanaju Ē~ ° pakar~…ĺa tu *-** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ *.*-* ńßunan. *-* a bur~…ĺad mabut…ôr~…ĺak tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺit, bar~…ĺu nu r~…ĺamit u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺa tu *-* a ńßunan, bar~…ĺu nu satabu adidi Ē~ ° tusa a ¶a, …ôn…ôm ku bar~…ĺu nu papańßan, tama a kasabar~…ĺu …ôn…ôm. u ńß…ô ¶i i *-* a mur~…ĺadan mazuńß…ôm tu, masa ¶ur~…ĺajaj a ńß…ô ¶i u tanaju Ē~ ° pakar~…ĺa tu *.*-* a ńßunan,duńß…ôpi ¶ ku puda ¶ nu ńß…ô ¶i, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sapu ¶u Ē~ °pu ¶u Ē~ ° sa adidi Ē~ ° mańßapinaŇč mańßiza u gaŇč masapu ¶u Ē~ °. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ,***,***. pnaaj tu a mińß ¶aan nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutuk, sadiŇčsiŇčan bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan tusa a puu Ē~ ° an ka but…ôr~…ĺakan nu bar~…ĺa, sir~…ĺ…ôd…ôkaj nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj. aŇčaŇčan r~…ĺamit masaatir~…ĺad, u t…ôr~…ĺ…ôk ¶a ¶aj ńßunan masamar~…ĺi anu ¶aaj masatanaju Ē~ ° ku kamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ , matańßpuaj nu maik…ôsaj nu akawaj a papańß r~…ĺa ¶r~…ĺa ¶ nu kudińß. makaj aŇčaŇčan mur~…ĺaŇčaw ku papańß *-** a papańßan, u papańß tanaju Ē~ °sa masak…ôr~…ĺiw, aŇčaŇčan nu papańß masatanaju Ē~ ° mazi ¶…ôm masinaŇč ku papańß, mańßiza u katur~…ĺ, tanaju Ē~ ° ku banuńß. papaŇčaan an ¶aaj ka but…ôr~…ĺak ku bar~…ĺu ńßawsa, ujza dada Ē~ ° ku maazińßaj tanaju Ē~ ° adidi Ē~ ° ku papańß, u adidi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺutuk ńßan nu itiniaj ¶iniza, kur~…ĺawr~…ĺaw adidi Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺu niza, ¶aaj kańßatiza u kar~…ĺibuwa Ē~ ° katabak, i apuju Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺutukan mańßizaaj u buna ¶ mabut…ôr~…ĺak tu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kakan…ôn atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan papaŇčaan a r~…ĺutuk mańßiniaj adidi Ē~ °aj kur~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj kur~…ĺit a bar~…ĺu kanańßatu i nan-ńßuj maazińßaj tu i zazanan, u aŇčaŇčan r~…ĺamit niza jadańß ku sakakapańß tu uzip atu sibińßun, u sakapańßaj a kakanan, nika u aŇčaŇčan r~…ĺamit nu ńß…ôni ¶ar~…ĺakańß ku kudińß, ¶aaj kadajum mik…ômk…ôm, sar~…ĺam…ôn kja mamuni. ¶unus tujni sumamadaj a ukak i abu mat…ôpa, kja par~…ĺatat…ôŇč iajaw nu ** maŇč a mińß ¶aan, i kasumamada tu ba Ē~ °tuaj ńß…ônaj a zidaj nu tad…ômaw ńßakaj matin…ôŇč tuwaj misar~…ĺamar~…ĺ. ujni u bińßun nu papaŇčaan tuŇčusa namakaj kasumamadan ńß…ônaj a zidaj, u tad…ômaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu u kir~…ĺaŇč kunisaŇča Ē~ °an tu aik…ô ¶aj saspikutkut tu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj u aŇčaŇčana r~…ĺamit. ¶i wa-ti-r~…ĺi a pasubana Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw tu ¶abaj atu mikiŇčkiwaj maapur~…ĺuŇč tu mikiŇčkiwaj a tad…ômaw, ¶i ti-aj-r~…ĺi-k…ô a pasubanaaj "fran ¶…ôs ¶o d Ē~ °…ôrri ¶o" sakamu sa, miŇčikiwaj a sakaput i r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu buńßaŇč mat…ôpa ku ¶a ¶aj kasuj a ukak, pisaŇčaan a d…ômiaan tan…ôŇč mikir~…ĺim ajaw nu * maŇč a mińß ¶aan, sazikuzaj, ujni papaŇčaan a r~…ĺutuk u ukak namat…ôpa pir~…ĺaŇčawan nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺaŇčaw tu zumaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, tinisa ¶a i buńßaŇč r~…ĺabu nu siabuaj, tat…ôŇč Ē~ ° namiar~…ĺa misup…ôd tujnian mur~…ĺaŇčawaj ńßawsa, taŇčsur~…ĺ ¶ajkasaan kan…ôn nu ńß…ôni, patajza…ôn nu ńß…ôni i buńßaŇč amipar~…ĺada Ē~ °, itawja makakanum tu, ma atin…ôŇč par~…ĺada Ē~ °, satu sakaj kakanan matin…ôŇč tu misazuma tu kakanan. ajzaaj a tad…ômaw kanańßatu ¶aaj tu pukan tu papaŇčaan a r~…ĺutuk, nika mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a u b…ôi- ¶uw au in-tu, papaŇčaan a r~…ĺutuk mar~…ĺa u kańß…ônur~…ĺan tu a r~…ĺutuk u sapaju a r~…ĺutuk, u sakakapańß nu bituka, ka ¶…ôkukan tu mar~…ĺa u kar~…ĺar~…ĺutinan tu nu mita tu kasumamadanaj a tad…ômaw. mit…ôs…ôkaj nu migikiwaj i na-ńßuj nu migikiwaj maazińßaj tu nu mita ku kar~…ĺijuńßan tu nikauzip nu kasumamadanaj a tad…ômaw, a mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu tuas nu tad…ômaw namakaj b…ôi- ¶uw mat…ôpa ku nazipaan sanaj a kamu, tańßkar~…ĺ i r~…ĺar~…ĺi Ē~ ° mar~…ĺańßad ku kar~…ĺijuńßan atu ¶ajaj ka zat…ôŇčaj a kawaw. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) papaŇčaan siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu masa…ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °aj, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj ku kur~…ĺit nu bar~…ĺu …ôn…ôm ku bar~…ĺu, kanamuńßan ku wajwaj nia, itawja namat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ku kamu namaazińß tu i nar~…ĺinabuwan tu"war~…ĺibajuan" sa. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: "**.) i i-r~…ĺan tuw- ¶…ôn piazińßan tu sar~…ĺuŇčajaj a kakitizaan, mamin mipasasa tu kaziz…ôŇč ńßawsa mikir~…ĺim tu banińßiwaj a kakitizaan mińßibaŇč mu…ôn…ôŇč, k…ôni Ē~ ° tu mata maazińß ku ¶a ¶aj kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj bar~…ĺu i tapiiŇčan tu, u bau kama ¶ar~…ĺan a bar~…ĺu asaan. u "papaŇčaan a r~…ĺutuk", itawjaj mańßi ¶aaj ¶aaj katin…ôŇč ¶aaj kar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku d…ômiad ńßakja, u bar~…ĺu niza ¶aaj kańßamin a mabut…ôr~…ĺak, sakar~…ĺamkam satu mur~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ mikir~…ĺim tu t…ôpar~…ĺaj a kakitizaan izaw ńß…ônaj ńßakja ku bar~…ĺu asaan, mańßini sa mat…ôpa tu ku pir~…ĺaŇčawan niza mat…ôpa tu ku mabut…ôr~…ĺakaj a bar~…ĺu, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan katanaju Ē~ ° ku pitapar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺaŇčaw niza, maazińß tu ¶iniza ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan kinatusa mabut…ôr~…ĺak ku bar~…ĺu, sadiŇčsiŇčan bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan mabut…ôr~…ĺak tu ku bar~…ĺu ziza. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .)
